# libabigail suppression spec for the ABI check (see .github/workflows/abi-check.yml).
#
# libtorrent::aux::* is an internal implementation-detail namespace (see
# TORRENT_EXTRA_EXPORT in include/libtorrent/aux_/export.hpp) -- it is not
# reachable from any TORRENT_EXPORT public header. It still shows up in
# abidiff because the build only sets -fvisibility=hidden, not
# -fvisibility-inlines-hidden, so inline template instantiations from
# external headers (e.g. boost::asio's io_context executors) that happen to
# close over an aux:: type keep default visibility and drag its layout into
# the exported symbol table. Suppress diffs attributable to aux:: types so
# purely-internal changes don't fail the check.
[suppress_type]
  name_regexp = ^libtorrent::aux::
